name: Cinnamon Buns (the Famous Dutch Sticky Buns)
recipeInstructions:
1. Dissolve yeast in warm water and add to milk that has been allowed to become lukewarm.
2. Add sugar (about 3 tablespoons), salt, and flour, then knead thoroughly until a soft dough forms.
3. Place the dough in a buttered bowl and butter the top of the dough.
4. Cover the bowl and place it in a warm place.
5. Allow the dough to rise until it is three times its original size.
6. Roll the dough until it is one-fourth of an inch thick.
7. Brush with butter and spread with raisins, currants, citron, brown sugar, and cinnamon.
8. Roll as a jelly roll and cut into slices that are three-eighths of an inch thick.
9. Place the slices in buttered pans and spread well with brown sugar.
10. Bake at 400°F for 20 minutes.
